fast_summary._community_reputation: Gemma 4 is Google's lightweight model series. Fast, reliable, good for low-stakes summarization tasks.

smart_summary._community_reputation: Qwen3.5 distilled from Claude Opus. Hidden gem — small (9.5GB) but high-quality output. Confirmed 67.5s summarize on worker.py (2026-05-12 live test).

code_worker._benchmark: 105s test-plan, 20s review — dedicated coder, intelligence > speed (zero12)
code_worker._community_reputation: Qwen3-Coder Next is the latest in the Qwen3-Coder family, designed for agentic coding and multi-step programming tasks.

commit_reviewer._benchmark: 10s review - lightweight coder for commit-gate diff review (zero12)
commit_reviewer._community_reputation: Qwen3-Coder is purpose-built for agentic coding, tool use, and multi-step programming. Strong public benchmarks for code editing and agent tasks.
commit_reviewer._constraints: Must never use >30B or reasoning models for commit gate. Latency target: under 30s.

diff_reviewer._community_reputation: Nemotron Nano Omni is NVIDIA's reasoning-augmented model. Good balance of reasoning depth and speed.
diff_reviewer._constraints: Only for explicit non-commit-gate review calls. Not for commit gate (use commit_reviewer). ~39GB, may cause GPU swap.

deep_reviewer._benchmark: 68s review, 0 timeouts — most reliable deep reviewer (zero12)
deep_reviewer._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 35B is a strong generalist with wide community adoption. Reliable on this machine (0 timeouts).
deep_reviewer._constraints: Not for commit gate (>30B). Use qwen3.6:35b-q8-ud (native MTP heads for ~1.5x speedup) over qwen3.5-35b for deep review.

heavy_reviewer._community_reputation: GPT-OSS 120B is a large open-source model. Good review quality for its size. Backup for Mistral Medium.
heavy_reviewer._constraints: Backup only. Prefer mistral-medium for release audit. Never in commit gate.

reasoning_checker._community_reputation: Qwen3.5 reasoning variant. Reliable for structured analysis. Top performer in local benchmarks (2/2 passed).
reasoning_checker._constraints: Not for commit gate. Use for explicit risk/logic/failure-mode tasks only.

deep_reasoning._community_reputation: DeepSeek R1 reasoning distilled into Qwen 32B. Official model card targets reasoning, math, and code. Strong community validation for deep analysis tasks.
deep_reasoning._constraints: CLI only. Only for architecture changes, security risks, root cause analysis. Never for commit gate or default routing.

translation._benchmark: 151s translate — only reliable option via MCP (zero12)
translation._community_reputation: GLM-4.7 Flash is the only CLI-verified translation model on this machine (151.4s, 2026-05-12 live test). translategemma-12b-it can translate via immersive plugin but the CLI prompt template does not trigger its translation behavior — prompt fix needed before it can be used as a faster alternative.

release_auditor._community_reputation: Mistral Medium 3.5 128B MoE. Widely regarded for accuracy in deep review tasks. Top of local benchmarks.
release_auditor._constraints: Release audit only. Must never enter commit gate or default review path.

gemma4_26b_llamacpp._note: Gemma 4 GGUF incompatible with current llama.cpp build (v340). Assistant drafter downloaded: gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-assistant.F16.gguf (816MB). Requires llama.cpp rebuild with Gemma 4 + MTP support.

gemma4_26b._benchmark: 37.8s summarize-file — Gemma 4 26B A4B MoE, good mid-size generalist (zero12)

gemma4_26b_mtp._note: MTP-accelerated via llama.cpp. Uses assistant GGUF as speculative decoding drafter for ~1.5-2x speedup.

mistral_119b_llamacpp._backend: Ollama (from GGUF via ollama create). BLOCKED: mistral4 arch not supported by Ollama's llama.cpp.
mistral_119b_llamacpp._launch: ollama create mistral-small-119b:q5 -f Modelfile (model loads but chat returns 500)
mistral_119b_llamacpp._status: unavailable — requires ollama llama.cpp update for mistral4 architecture

qwen3.6_27b_mtp._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 27B UD. Gated Delta Net (SSM) hybrid. Q8_0 via Ollama. Native MTP heads.
qwen3.6_27b_mtp._constraints: Not for commit gate. llama.cpp MTP on port 8082 (native MTP heads, no drafter needed). Ollama fallback: qwen3.6:27b-q8-ud.

qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._benchmark: TBD — Qwen3.6 35B MoE UD with native MTP heads (~1.5-2x speedup via speculative decoding)
qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 35B MoE UD. Gated Delta Net (SSM) hybrid. Native MTP for fast inference.
qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._constraints: Not for commit gate (>30B). llama.cpp MTP on port 8083 (native MTP heads, no drafter needed, -fit off -ngl 60). Ollama fallback: qwen3.6:35b-q8-ud.

ollama.description: Default backend. All profiles except mistral_119b work via Ollama.

llama_cpp_mtp.description: llama.cpp with MTP speculative decoding. Requires manual server start.

native_mtp_models.qwen3.6_27b_mtp: Qwen3.6 has native MTP heads — no drafter needed
native_mtp_models.qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp: Qwen3.6 MoE has native MTP heads — no drafter needed

_notes.method: solo testing (one model at a time, no GPU contention)
_notes.corrected_from_parallel_testing: qwen3.5-35b was TIMEOUT in parallel → 68s solo.
_notes.mtp_drafter_models: gemma assistant GGUF files are MTP speculative decoding drafters, NOT standalone models. Use via llama.cpp --mtp-head.
